title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.123 - Violation deemed unfair trade practice
text:
379.123.  Violation deemed unfair trade practice. — Violation of section 379.122 shall be unfair trade practice as defined by sections 375.930 to 375.948 and shall be subject to all of the provisions and penalties provided by such sections.
(L. 2001 S.B. 151) 
Transferred 2004; formerly 379.127 
*Section number "375.126" appears in original rolls.
